## Category
**Cluster:** Email Security / Security Awareness Training
**Note:** Formerly HelpSystems / Agari. Incorporates Agari email fraud defense, PhishLabs, Cobalt Strike (pen test), and 30+ security products.

---

## Product Brief
1. Consolidated security platform: email security, pen testing, data protection, and infrastructure security
2. Key products: Agari (BEC/phishing defense), PhishLabs (threat intelligence), Cobalt Strike (red team)
3. Differentiator: breadth across offensive + defensive tooling under one vendor
